case_title: RODRIGUEZ, NOEL E. VS ZOCCA, GIOVANNI

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED SENT TO DEFT.
CERT. MAIL SENT TO: NOEL E. RODRIGUEZ MAILED BY CROSS-COMPLAINANT (GIOVANNI ZOCCA) RETURNED ADDRES S TO COURT "UNCLAIMED".

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, NOEL E. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZOCCA, GIOVANNI PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY DEFENDANT $0.0 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED (DEPARTMENT 506).
